prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Hey there! I know this task has been looming over you all morning, but I have complete faith in your ability to tackle it head-on. You are more capable than you give yourself credit for, and I know you can do this. Take a deep breath, break it down into manageable steps, and tackle it one step at a time. Before you know it, you'll have accomplished something you've been avoiding all day. Go get 'em!
